events.preview:
Bash {"command": "for d in 2025/12/25 2025/12/26 2025/12/27; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ($(wc -l < $f) articles)
[...truncated]

input.command:
for d in 2025/12/25 2025/12/26 2025/12/27; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"
  [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ($(wc -l < $f) articles) ==="
  # Look for high-signal near-term keywords
  grep -oiE "(zelensky|defence minister|interim president|measles|charlotte|oreshnik|nicaragua|venezuela|nepal prime minister|portugal president|bulgaria president|tyson fury|brisbane final)" "$f" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -15
done
input.description: Grep recent articles for near-term keyword signals
